প্রিয় ভাইয়েরা,
আপনারা নিশ্চয়ই অবগত আছেন 'আবাবিল ফাউন্ডেশন' এর আয়োজনে আগামীকাল শুক্রবার বাদ আসর শহীদ খুশি রেলওয়ে ময়দানে এক প্রীতি ফুটবল ম্যাচের  আয়োজন করা হয়েছে। 
'বিবাহিত বনাম অবিবাহিত'  খেলাটি সবার জন্য উন্মুক্ত থাকবে, যে কেউ চাইলে এই খেলায় অংশগ্রহণ করতে পারবে৷
খেলা শেষে আবাবিল ফাউন্ডেশনের পক্ষ থেকে যথাসাধ্য মেহমানদারির ব্যবস্থা থাকবে ইনশা আল্লাহ। 
দ্বীনি ভাইদের এই মিলনমেলায় আপনারা স্ববান্ধব আমন্ত্রিত।

line:Ce7fb92f8d85056790b4bb319db0592b5.text:
🌟 Early Check-in & Late Check-out

If the calendar is open, we’d be delighted to offer them for free!

But because other guests often check out right before your stay (and in right after), we may not always confirm this in advance.


That said — here are some great alternatives that past guests found super helpful:


---

Option 1. 🧳 Luggage Drop at Home

Arrive early or fly late? Simply leave your bags at the house between 11:00 AM – 3:00 PM.

You’ll be free to explore without heavy luggage and return when check-in or airport time comes.

It’s simple, practical, and lets you start (or end) your day light and happy.



---

Option 2. ✨ Driver-Assisted Luggage Service

A. Arriving very early (before 10:00 AM)

Your driver collects your luggage straight from the airport and brings it to our office.

Go enjoy Seoul right away, and we’ll place your bags inside your home before 3:00 PM.

Fee: ₩30,000 per driver (South of Hanriver 20K KRW extra) 


B. Leaving late (after 3:00 PM)

Your driver picks up luggage at the house and keeps it safe until your airport departure.

You can roam freely, and he’ll meet you anywhere in the Gangbuk area before heading to the airport.

Fee: ₩30,000 per driver (South of Hanriver 20K KRW extra)


Perfect for those who want convenience and comfort without luggage worries.


---

Option 3. 🧭 Private Tour with Tour Host(Guide & Storyteller)

Turn arrival or departure day into a sightseeing day!

Your dedicated tour host will guide you through hidden gems and local favorites while handling all the transfers.

This way, your “waiting hours” transform into one of the best memories of your trip.

Guests often call this the smartest way to make the most of their time.



---

Option 4. 🛏️ Book an Extra Night

If you’re traveling with children, elderly family, or simply value total peace of mind, adding one more night is the ultimate comfort.

No rush, no stress — just rest, unpack, and enjoy your cozy space at your own pace.

Sometimes, that extra night is the secret to a smoother and happier journey.



---

💫 Whichever option you choose, we’ll make sure your stay feels easy, joyful, and tailored just for you. If you’d like us to arrange any of these in advance, simply let us know — we’re always here with a happy heart.

With warmth & good vibes,
Gaya | Guest Care Team of COZE Hospitality 3.0

120363429789674074@g.us.text:
COZE Hospitality 3.0

All You Need. All in One. All Yours.


🇰🇷✨ Welcome to Korea! And Welcome to COZE.

Jet-lagged? Phone not working? Hungry but can’t read the menu?
We get it. And we’ve built a stay just for you.

COZE is where your trip begins with care — not confusion.
We don’t just rent homes. We curate your entire Korean experience around you.

> Think: a home in Korea, powered by local friends who do everything for you.
Here we share the service instruction!
3F 97-1, Duteopbawi-ro, Yongsan-gu, Seoul, Republic of Korea 04336

Main Gate Pin 0 2 1 8 *
(*Please make sure once again the main gate closed properly for residence security 🙏*)

The neighborhood information (with Naver Map Link)
*Please sign up Naver, and download Navermap app, and save our list in the app! very useful insight you will have to understand your neighborhood very quickly*

📌 Essential Information

Address — 3F 97‑1 Duteopbawi‑ro, Yongsan‑gu, Seoul 04336

Main Entrance Code — 0 2 1 8 * → Always check that it relocks after every in/out

Your Suite Door Code(Including AERIES GARDEN) 

— Check‑in date in the format YYMMDD + *

Example: 10 May 2025 → 250510* (remains the same throughout your stay)

Wi‑Fi Networks

3F HTB — SSID KT_WiFi_5G_F3EB / PIN 0efd1cc848

4F AERIES Garden — SSID iptime_ring / no password

👶📡 Baby Monitor Available
Keep an eye on little ones or pets on another floor in real time.
📍 Where to find it
Baby-amenities cabinet (camera + monitor set)
🔌 Quick Start
Camera — plug in the USB power (DC 5 V) cable and leave it on.
Monitor — fully charge via USB-C, then use cord-free.
Hold the power button to pair; once connected, you’re ready to go.


📱 Guest Smartphone Provided

A smartphone with a Korean phone number and unlimited data & calls is provided free of charge during your stay!
Use it as a Wi-Fi hotspot and access all essential apps like Coupang Eats, KakaoTaxi, Naver Maps, and more.

💡 Local Tip:

Check out the Naver Map app — we’ve bookmarked great local spots like restaurants, supermarkets, banks, clinics, and more. It’s like having a local guide in your pocket! 🗺️📍

🍽️ Food Delivery Orders

Use the guest smartphone to open the Coupang Eats app.

Add your items to the cart, take a screenshot of the final summary, and send it to us via Messenger.

We’ll place the order and pay for it. You can reimburse us in cash or cryptocurrency at checkout.

🚖 MPV Taxi Booking

We can assist you with real-time bookings via IM TAXI.

MPV taxis seat up to 7 people — ideal for groups of 4–7

Fares are about 30% higher than standard taxis

Need multiple vans? No problem — just expect a short delay

🍳 Kitchen & Appliances

A full kitchen includes: dishwasher, oven, water purifier.

💧 Water Purifier (EVERPURE)
Brand: EVERPURE (USA) — Starbucks official partner
Type: Direct-flow purified water system
Maintenance: Professionally serviced monthly
How to use: Use the small faucet on the left side of the sink labeled “정수기 / Purified Water.”
Benefit: Very safe, great-tasting water for drinking & cooking

Feel free to cook like home! 


☕ Capsule Coffee & Tea

Extra tea and coffee capsules are in the drawer beneath the living room tea cabinet. Feel free to help yourself!

illy Coffee Machine

Quick Guide
https://youtu.be/XEDAXZY50FM?si=uOfwquZXC6WCis_G

Steam Milk
https://youtu.be/bTzG7iM4dMA?si=aiEWUseiOT0as-Jo

Program the Volume
https://youtu.be/h2X5gLYpf_4?si=eaDtARcyGQTjddFz

♻️ Food Waste Disposal

The sink disposer grinds food waste. Turn on the water and press the foot pedal.

⚠️ No bones or shells—these can damage the disposer!
Dispose of hard waste separately.

🗑️ General & Recycling Waste

Three trash bins in the living room:

General waste

Recyclables

Another bin (use as needed)

If they fill up, tie the bag and leave it in the hallway. Let our team know, and we’ll take it out.

Korean garbage rules can be tricky—feel free to ask us first!

📽️ Multimedia Setup

There’s a projector connected to Korean TV & Google TV.

Turn on the projector

Power on the Yamaha soundbar

Use the soundbar remote to select TV or Google TV input

🧴 Amenities

About 10 sets of face, body, and foot towels are in the master bedroom storage.

Hotel amenities (toothbrushes, razors, etc.) are also stored there.

💨 Ventilation System

One heat-exchange ventilator is constantly running.
Leave it on for fresh air even with windows closed!

🔥 Heating

The main bedroom has a floor-heating thermostat (ondol).

Set it to around 22°C for comfortable year-round living.

Do not turn it OFF—it also supplies hot water.

If you don’t want the floor heating, switch to “Away Mode” but keep it powered on.

🔥 BBQ & Firepit

BBQ gear is in the deck containers beside the firepit:

Charcoal

Fire starters

Torch, gloves, tools

Firepit Info:

Extra firewood: to the left of the AERIES GARDEN entrance

Firepit fee: ₩30,000

Extra firewood: ₩20,000

Fire extinguisher is beside the pit

⚠️ Keep noise low after 8 PM
⚠️ No fireworks or uncontrolled flames
⚠️ Guests are responsible for safe usage

🔇 Noise Control

After 8 PM, please be mindful of neighbors.

If chatting loudly indoors, close windows to contain noise.
Absolutely no fireworks or open-flame activities allowed.

🚭 Smoking

Smoking is allowed on the rooftop garden only.

Please use the ashtray on the table.

Indoor smoking triggers a carbon monoxide detector—just like on an airplane!

🚗 Parking

1 spot available on the 1st floor parking area.

If the 2nd-floor guests have a car too, they may park in a line.

Let our concierge team know if you need to move cars around!

We’ll assist you for smooth parking arrangements.
